author: dunkin-novice
goal: Rebuild the daily Share Poster (design §11 ScreenPoster, Option A) — minimal ceremonial italic-serif layout.
done: Rewrote the daily-mode block in share/poster.js: italic-serif Cormorant wordmark + gold accent line, render-time date eyebrow (new Date(); EN uppercase / TH th-TH; display-only social proof, NOT collected, no payload/schema change), card with warm radial aura, gold-tracked 'Today's Card · Upright' badge, large auto-fit italic-serif card name (<=2 lines), gold diamond+line ornament, and the FULL reading line as an italic-serif tagline (auto-fit, never shortened). Dropped reading-panel box, lucky-colors row, footer per Option A. Card name renders in EN in BOTH locales per explicit user direction (interim until Thai card names land). Added Cormorant Garamond + Noto Serif Thai to share/index.html + a document.fonts.load pre-pass so italic faces are ready before canvas draw. Parameterized fitDailyQuoteText (fontFamily/defaultSize/minSize/addQuotes). Added badgePrefix to in-module getDailyStrings.
verified: HTML/CSS preview rendered at 1080x1920 over localhost
notes: resolvePosterCardImageSources call order unchanged; share/normalize-payload.js untouched; no share-payload schema change (date is render-time only). Poster strings follow the existing in-module getDailyStrings pattern, not common.js, consistent with prior poster code. Visual QA of the real Canvas output still pending in-browser (Dunkin); the preview is an HTML/CSS mock matched to the code constants. share/poster-preview/ is a dev artifact, not shipped.

author: dunkin-novice
goal: Defensive cross-deck face fallback so a deck with missing/lagging art shows the default-deck face, not a card back (BUG-020).
done: When an active-deck card face fails to load, fall back to the DEFAULT_DECK_ID (moonmallow) face BEFORE any card back, by swapping the /assets/<deck>/ path segment (decks share identical nn-slug-orientation.webp filenames). Added at the callers (js/asset-resolver.js untouched per hard rule #4): js/reading.js getCardImageUrlWithFallback() candidate lists + share/poster.js daily resolveCardImage() fallbackUrls. Also corrected stale 'meow-v2' comment in js/data.js (card art resolves via the active deck-id, moonmallow default).
verified: URL-swap unit check: boba-oracle->moonmallow, no-op when active==default, null-safe
notes: Defensive only — fires solely on an image load error; no-op when assets exist. The original 'boba-oracle is incomplete' diagnosis was WRONG (it came from hand-guessed card slugs/numbers); re-tested with real card_ids, boba-oracle is COMPLETE (78/78 upright 200, reversed sample 200). So this fix addresses a latent gap, not a confirmed live trigger; the user's device symptom is likely historical asset-lag or stale cache. BUG-020 recorded + corrected in docs/open-bugs.md. Follow-ups open: extend fallback to question/full/celtic poster modes; consider gating setActiveDeck for incomplete/anonymous decks (cf BUG-016/BUG-019).
